**Compassionate-use dosing summary**
- **Compound:** NXB-7042
- **Indication:** Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)
- **Source:** `helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml`
- **Last updated:** 2026-03-28

| Patient | Weight (kg) | Dose (mg/kg) | Calculated dose | Frequency | Next dose | PK clearance |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|
| CU-001 | 12.4 | 0.15 | **1.86 mg** | q3w | 2026-04-14 | 3.2 mL/min |
| CU-002 | 9.1 | 0.12 | **1.09 mg** | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 mL/min |
| CU-003 | 15.7 | 0.18 | **2.83 mg** | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 mL/min |

**Clinical notes**
- **CU-001:** Stable; tumor regression 22% at last scan
- **CU-002:** Responding well; weight gain improving
- **CU-003:** New enrollment; first dose given 2026-03-27

**PK model status**
At a config-level check, everything looks **stable and internally consistent**. I don’t see any obvious anomalies in the latest dosing parameters or patient notes. That said, this is based on the stored dosing config, not a fresh rerun of the PK models.

I also saved a brief report titled **“Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary for Dr. Martinez.”** If you want, I can format this into a tighter one-paragraph handoff note.
